case_title: MARIA VADO MARENCO VS. ARNULFO DEMOCILLO TIBON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TIBON, ARNULFO DEMOCILLO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARTA RIESEN PRESENT ON PLAINITFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VADO MARENCO, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TIBON, ARNULFO DEMOCILLO DEFENDANT FAILED TO YIELD TO PLAINTIFF BUT PLAINTIFF DID NOT EXCERCISE DUE CAUTION WHEN SHE WALKED BEHIND DEFENDANT'S CAR. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE CONDITION SHE COMPLAINS OF AND FOR WHICH SHE SOUGHT MEDICAL CARE WAS A PROXIMATE RESULT OF THE INJURY SHE CLAIMS WAS CAUSED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VADO MARENCO, MARIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY VADO MARENCO, MARIA TIBON, ARNULFO DEMOCILLO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VADO MARENCO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT TIBON, ARNULFO DEMOCILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
